commentary_text: The market prices Algeria to win at 53%, a 15-percentage-point edge over the model's 38%. Both sources favor Algeria, but the sportsbook consensus is substantially more bullish, while the model sees a tighter three-way outcome. The market's sharper conviction on an Algeria victory could reflect recent lineup news, injury updates, or current form data unavailable to the model's last training window. The model, built on Elo ratings and goal-scoring patterns, may not yet incorporate real-time roster or conditioning information that money flows have already priced in. This dashboard surfaces the gap as a signal worth monitoring rather than a judgment on which forecast will prove correct.
